problem id: 5374b4ba
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10111101 -> 10101011
  01001111 -> 11100100
  11010110 -> 11001101
  10011101 -> 10101001
  11010000 -> 00001101
  00010101 -> 10100001
  00011010 -> 01000001
  00100000 -> 00000010
  10101111 -> 11101010
  01010000 -> 00000101

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 10101100
